THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF QUINN, JAMES P. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LYNCH, KAREN $997.50 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,057.50, THE MADE CERTAIN ABATEMENTS OF DEFENDANT'S RENT FOR PERIODS WHEN THE BUILDING ELEVATOR WAS INOPERABLE AND AS AN ALLOWANCE FOR OTHER PROBLEMS ON THE PREMISES. THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS THE AMOUNT DUE TO PLAINTIFF AFTER CREDIT FOR DEFENDANT'S $600.00 MONTHLY PAYMENTS FROM OCTOBER 1, 2001 THROUGH APRIL 30, 2010. calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-04-2010 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: 11:12am
Judge Pro Tem Bruce Lubarsky, clerk Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 525.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Karen Lynch, appears through her attorney J. Scott Weaver. Respondent James Quinn appears through his attorney Colin Hatcher.
Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Lubarsky.

Parties tell the Judge that they have reached an agreement while waiting and the Small Claims Appeal case is being dismissed.
Exhibits are returned to Karen Lynch and James Quinn through their respective attorneys.

11:15am

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar May-25-2010 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Mar-24-2010 Continued To May-05-10 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 506
